name: 三兄弟豪車護妹
name_en: Three Brothers Grand Entrance to Protect Sister
description: 三位CEO兄長高調現身（與女主「要低調」的叮囑形成反差），展示頂級豪門氣場。視覺上製造「小公主被全世界最強後盾包圍」的畫面。
tags: 低調身份與高調保護的反差，旁人從看不起到震驚的轉變

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: There they are. The three young masters of the Goo family. / A princess should be pampered and loved by all. / Didn't we say be Loki? Be low key.
examples.context: 低調身份與高調保護的反差，旁人從看不起到震驚的轉變
